name: W2E What to Eat
description: Agent skills for discovering W2E app information, features, and download links

skills.name: get_app_info
skills.description: Retrieve W2E app name, tagline, and core description

skills.name: get_features
skills.description: Retrieve the full feature list: squad matching, food discovery, AI recommendations, live location, taste profiles, rewards

skills.name: get_download_links
skills.description: Retrieve app store links to download W2E on iOS and Android
